dosageAdults: 50mg once daily, may increase to 100mg
onsetTime: Lowers blood pressure within 1–2 hours
summaryEn: Atenolol is a beta blocker used to treat high blood pressure, angina, and heart rhythm problems. It slows the heart rate and reduces the workload on the heart.
summaryUr: اٹینولول ہائی بلڈ پریشر، انجائنا اور دل کی دھڑکن کے مسائل کے علاج کے لیے بیٹا بلاکر ہے۔ یہ دل کی دھڑکن کو سست کرتی ہے اور دل پر بوجھ کم کرتی ہے۔
warningsPlain: Do not stop suddenly — taper dose under doctor supervision. May mask symptoms of low blood sugar in diabetics.
sideEffectsPlain: Cold hands and feet, fatigue, dizziness, slow heart rate.
pregnancySafetyPlain: May affect fetal heart rate. Use only if benefit outweighs risk.
importantNote: Never stop abruptly — gradual reduction under medical supervision required.
searchKeywords: tenormin atenolol beta blocker hypertension blood pressure heart astrazeneca

dosageAdults: 5mg once daily; may increase to 10mg
onsetTime: Gradual onset over several days of regular use
summaryEn: Amlodipine relaxes blood vessels to lower blood pressure and is also used for chest pain (angina). It is usually taken once daily and is well tolerated.
summaryUr: ایملوڈیپین خون کی نالیوں کو آرام دیتی ہے تاکہ بلڈ پریشر کم ہو اور سینے کے درد کے لیے بھی استعمال ہوتی ہے۔ یہ عام طور پر دن میں ایک بار لی جاتی ہے۔
warningsPlain: May cause ankle swelling and facial flushing. Do not stop without consulting doctor.
sideEffectsPlain: Ankle swelling, flushing, headache, palpitations.
pregnancySafetyPlain: Avoid during pregnancy. Consult doctor.
importantNote: Take at the same time each day. Ankle swelling is common but not dangerous.
searchKeywords: norvasc amlodipine calcium channel blocker hypertension angina pfizer

dosageAdults: 75mg once daily after food
onsetTime: Antiplatelet effect within 15–30 minutes
summaryEn: Loprin (low-dose Aspirin 75mg) prevents blood clots forming in arteries. It is prescribed after heart attacks, strokes, or to patients at high cardiovascular risk. Take after food to protect the stomach.
summaryUr: لوپرین (کم خوراک اسپرین 75mg) شریانوں میں خون کے لوتھڑے بننے سے روکتی ہے۔ یہ دل کے دورے، فالج کے بعد یا دل کے زیادہ خطرے والے مریضوں کو تجویز کی جاتی ہے۔
warningsPlain: Take after food. May cause stomach irritation or bleeding. Tell your dentist and surgeon you are taking it.
sideEffectsPlain: Stomach irritation, GI bleeding risk, easy bruising.
pregnancySafetyPlain: Avoid unless specifically prescribed. Consult doctor.
importantNote: Do not stop without doctor advice — stopping suddenly can increase clot risk.
warnings: Never in children under 16 with fever
searchKeywords: loprin aspirin antiplatelet cardiovascular prevention heart stroke abbott 75mg

dosageAdults: 10–80mg once daily, usually at night
onsetTime: Cholesterol levels improve within 2–4 weeks
summaryEn: Lipitor (Atorvastatin) lowers bad cholesterol and triglycerides in the blood, reducing the risk of heart attack and stroke. It is usually taken at night and requires regular blood tests.
summaryUr: لیپیٹور (اٹورواسٹاٹن) خون میں برے کولیسٹرول اور چربی کو کم کرتی ہے اور دل کے دورے اور فالج کا خطرہ گھٹاتی ہے۔ یہ عام طور پر رات کو لی جاتی ہے۔
warningsPlain: Report unexplained muscle pain, weakness, or dark urine immediately — rare but serious muscle condition possible.
sideEffectsPlain: Muscle aches, elevated liver enzymes, headache, digestive problems.
pregnancySafetyPlain: Contraindicated in pregnancy and breastfeeding.
importantNote: Regular blood tests for liver function and cholesterol monitoring required.
searchKeywords: lipitor atorvastatin statin cholesterol heart pfizer tablet

dosageAdults: Dose adjusted by INR blood test result — typically 2–10mg daily
onsetTime: Full anticoagulant effect takes 2–3 days
summaryEn: Warfarin is a blood thinner prescribed to prevent blood clots in patients with atrial fibrillation, mechanical heart valves, or after deep vein thrombosis. Regular INR blood tests are essential to keep the dose safe.
summaryUr: وارفارن ایک خون پتلا کرنے والی دوائی ہے جو دل کی بے قاعدہ دھڑکن، مکینیکل دل کے والوز یا خون کے لوتھڑوں کی روک تھام کے لیے تجویز کی جاتی ہے۔ خوراک محفوظ رکھنے کے لیے باقاعدہ INR خون کے ٹیسٹ ضروری ہیں۔
warningsPlain: Requires regular blood monitoring (INR). Any unexplained bleeding must be reported immediately. Many foods and medicines affect warfarin.
sideEffectsPlain: Bleeding is the main risk — bruising, prolonged bleeding from cuts, blood in urine or stools.
pregnancySafetyPlain: Contraindicated in first trimester. Use heparin instead during pregnancy.
importantNote: Carry a warfarin card. Never miss INR tests. Consistent vitamin K intake important.
searchKeywords: coumadin warfarin anticoagulant blood thinner clot atrial fibrillation

dosageAdults: 500mg twice daily with meals; increase gradually as tolerated
dosageChildren: 500mg once or twice daily for children over 10
onsetTime: Begins lowering blood sugar within 1–2 hours; full effect in 2–3 months
summaryEn: Glucophage (Metformin) is the first-line medicine for Type 2 diabetes. It lowers blood sugar by reducing glucose production in the liver and improving insulin sensitivity. Always take with meals.
summaryUr: گلوکوفاج (میٹفارمن) ٹائپ 2 ذیابیطس کے لیے پہلی لائن دوائی ہے۔ یہ جگر میں گلوکوز کی پیداوار کم کرکے اور انسولین کی حساسیت بہتر کرکے خون میں شکر گھٹاتی ہے۔ ہمیشہ کھانے کے ساتھ لیں۔
warningsPlain: Take with food to reduce stomach side effects. Stop before any X-ray or scan using contrast dye. Tell doctor if vomiting occurs.
sideEffectsPlain: Nausea, diarrhoea, and stomach cramps are common at start. Usually improve after a few weeks.
pregnancySafetyPlain: May be used in pregnancy for gestational diabetes. Consult doctor.
importantNote: Take with meals. Never skip meals when on this medicine. Stop 48 hours before surgery or contrast X-ray.
warnings: Risk of lactic acidosis in kidney disease
searchKeywords: glucophage metformin diabetes type 2 blood sugar merck tablet

dosageAdults: 850mg once or twice daily with meals
onsetTime: Begins lowering blood sugar within 1–2 hours
summaryEn: Higher-strength Metformin 850mg tablet for Type 2 diabetes management. Same mechanism as 500mg but fewer tablets needed.
summaryUr: ٹائپ 2 ذیابیطس کے انتظام کے لیے زیادہ طاقت والی میٹفارمن 850mg گولی۔
warningsPlain: Take with food. Stop before contrast X-ray procedures.
sideEffectsPlain: Nausea, diarrhoea, stomach discomfort.
pregnancySafetyPlain: May be used under medical supervision.
importantNote: Always take with meals to minimise GI side effects.
searchKeywords: glucophage metformin 850 diabetes blood sugar merck tablet

dosageAdults: 2.5–5mg once daily with breakfast; increase to 15mg if needed
onsetTime: Lowers blood sugar within 30–60 minutes
summaryEn: Daonil (Glibenclamide) stimulates the pancreas to produce more insulin. Used for Type 2 diabetes when metformin alone is insufficient. Risk of hypoglycaemia if meals are missed.
summaryUr: ڈاؤنل (گلیبنکلامائیڈ) لبلبے کو زیادہ انسولین بنانے کی تحریک دیتی ہے۔ جب میٹفارمن اکیلی کافی نہ ہو تو ٹائپ 2 ذیابیطس کے لیے استعمال ہوتی ہے۔
warningsPlain: Never skip meals when taking this medicine — risk of dangerously low blood sugar (hypoglycaemia). Carry glucose tablets.
sideEffectsPlain: Low blood sugar (hypoglycaemia): shakiness, sweating, confusion. Weight gain possible.
pregnancySafetyPlain: Avoid in pregnancy. Switch to insulin.
importantNote: Always carry glucose sweets. Take with breakfast. Do not skip meals.
searchKeywords: daonil glibenclamide sulphonylurea diabetes insulin sanofi tablet

dosageAdults: Dose individualised by doctor. Typically injected 30 minutes before meals.
onsetTime: Starts working within 30 minutes; peak at 1–3 hours
storageInstructions: Unopened: refrigerate 2–8°C. In-use vial: room temperature below 25°C for up to 4 weeks. Do not freeze.
summaryEn: Actrapid is a short-acting insulin injected before meals to control blood sugar spikes after eating. It is used for both Type 1 and Type 2 diabetes requiring insulin.
summaryUr: ایکٹراپڈ ایک مختصر مدت کی انسولین ہے جو کھانے سے پہلے لگائی جاتی ہے تاکہ کھانے کے بعد خون میں شکر کا اضافہ کنٹرول ہو۔
warningsPlain: Risk of hypoglycaemia if dose too high or meal skipped. Always have fast-acting sugar available. Rotate injection sites.
sideEffectsPlain: Hypoglycaemia, injection site reactions, weight gain.
pregnancySafetyPlain: Safe in pregnancy. Dose adjustment required.
importantNote: Inject 30 minutes before meal. Never inject into a vein. Rotate injection sites.
searchKeywords: actrapid insulin regular soluble short acting diabetes novo nordisk injection

dosageAdults: Once daily subcutaneous injection at same time each day
onsetTime: Steady basal effect over 24 hours — no pronounced peak
storageInstructions: Unopened: refrigerate 2–8°C. In-use pen: room temperature below 25°C up to 28 days. Never freeze.
summaryEn: Lantus is a once-daily long-acting background insulin that provides stable blood sugar control throughout the day and night. It has no peak effect making hypoglycaemia less likely than with older insulins.
summaryUr: لینٹس ایک روزانہ ایک بار لگائی جانے والی طویل مدت کی بنیادی انسولین ہے جو دن اور رات کے دوران خون میں شکر کو مستحکم رکھتی ہے۔
warningsPlain: Do not mix with other insulins in same syringe. Never inject into vein. Rotate injection sites. Monitor blood sugar regularly.
sideEffectsPlain: Hypoglycaemia, injection site reactions, weight gain.
pregnancySafetyPlain: Use under medical supervision during pregnancy.
importantNote: Inject at the same time every day. Do not mix with other insulins.
warnings: Do not mix with other insulins
searchKeywords: lantus insulin glargine long acting basal diabetes sanofi injection

dosageAdults: 100mg twice daily on day 1, then 100mg once daily
onsetTime: Starts fighting infection within 1–2 hours
storageInstructions: Store below 25°C away from light and moisture
summaryEn: Doxycycline is used for chest infections, tick-borne diseases, acne, urinary tract infections, and malaria prevention. Take with a full glass of water and remain upright for 30 minutes after taking.
summaryUr: ڈوکسی سائکلین سینے کی انفیکشن، ٹک سے پھیلنے والی بیماریوں، مہاسوں، پیشاب کی نالی کی انفیکشن اور ملیریا سے بچاؤ کے لیے استعمال ہوتی ہے۔
warningsPlain: Avoid sunlight — causes photosensitivity. Take upright with water. Not for children under 8 or pregnant women. Avoid dairy within 2 hours.
sideEffectsPlain: Nausea, photosensitivity, oesophageal irritation if not taken with water.
pregnancySafetyPlain: Contraindicated in pregnancy and breastfeeding.
importantNote: Take with full glass of water while sitting upright. Avoid lying down for 30 minutes after dose.
searchKeywords: vibramycin doxycycline tetracycline antibiotic chest acne malaria pfizer capsule

dosageAdults: 250–500mg twice daily for 7–14 days
onsetTime: Starts fighting infection within 2 hours
summaryEn: Klacid (Clarithromycin) treats chest infections, throat infections, skin infections, and H. pylori stomach infections. Can be taken with or without food.
summaryUr: کلیسڈ (کلیریتھرومائسن) سینے کی انفیکشن، گلے کی انفیکشن، جلد کی انفیکشن اور H. پائلوری معدے کی انفیکشن کا علاج کرتی ہے۔
warningsPlain: May cause abnormal heart rhythm in rare cases. Avoid grapefruit juice.
sideEffectsPlain: Nausea, diarrhoea, abnormal taste, stomach pain.
pregnancySafetyPlain: Avoid during pregnancy if possible.
importantNote: Complete the full course. Avoid grapefruit juice during treatment.
searchKeywords: klacid clarithromycin macrolide antibiotic chest throat abbott tablet

dosageAdults: 2 tablets (960mg) twice daily
onsetTime: Starts fighting infection within 1–2 hours
summaryEn: Septran (Co-trimoxazole) treats urinary tract infections, respiratory tract infections, and some types of diarrhoea. Drink plenty of water while taking this medicine.
summaryUr: سیپٹران (کو-ٹرائیموکسازول) پیشاب کی نالی کی انفیکشن، سانس کی نالی کی انفیکشن اور کچھ اقسام کے اسہال کا علاج کرتی ہے۔
warningsPlain: Drink plenty of water. May cause skin rash — stop immediately if rash develops. Avoid prolonged sun exposure.
sideEffectsPlain: Skin rash, nausea, vomiting. Rarely causes serious skin reactions.
pregnancySafetyPlain: Avoid in first trimester and near delivery.
importantNote: Drink at least 2 litres of water daily. Stop and seek help if a rash develops.
searchKeywords: septran co-trimoxazole trimethoprim sulfamethoxazole antibiotic uti gsk tablet

dosageAdults: 500mg once daily for 7–14 days
onsetTime: Starts fighting infection within 1–2 hours
summaryEn: Tavanic (Levofloxacin) is a strong antibiotic used for chest infections, urinary tract infections, sinusitis, and skin infections. Take with plenty of water and avoid sun exposure.
summaryUr: ٹاوانک (لیووفلوکساسین) سینے کی انفیکشن، پیشاب کی نالی کی انفیکشن، سائنوسائٹس اور جلد کی انفیکشن کے لیے ایک طاقتور اینٹی بائیوٹک ہے۔
warningsPlain: Avoid sunlight. May cause tendon injury especially in elderly or those on steroids. Avoid antacids within 2 hours.
sideEffectsPlain: Nausea, diarrhoea, headache, photosensitivity. Tendonitis/tendon rupture rare but serious.
pregnancySafetyPlain: Avoid in pregnancy and breastfeeding.
importantNote: Report any tendon pain immediately. Avoid sun. Do not take with antacids.
contraindications: History of tendon disorders with fluoroquinolones
searchKeywords: tavanic levofloxacin fluoroquinolone antibiotic chest uti sanofi tablet

dosageAdults: 40mg once daily before breakfast
dosageChildren: Not routinely used in children under 12
onsetTime: Full effect within 2–3 days of regular use
summaryEn: Controloc (Pantoprazole) reduces stomach acid production. Used for acid reflux, stomach ulcers, and Zollinger-Ellison syndrome. Swallow tablets whole — do not crush or chew.
summaryUr: کنٹرولوک (پینٹوپرازول) معدے میں تیزاب کی پیداوار کم کرتی ہے۔ ایسڈ ریفلکس، معدے کے السر کے لیے استعمال ہوتی ہے۔ گولیاں پوری نگلیں — کچلیں یا چبائیں نہیں۔
warningsPlain: Swallow whole — do not crush. Long-term use may reduce vitamin B12 and magnesium.
sideEffectsPlain: Headache, diarrhoea, nausea. Long-term use affects B12 and magnesium.
pregnancySafetyPlain: Use with caution in pregnancy.
importantNote: Take 30 minutes before breakfast. Swallow whole.
searchKeywords: controloc pantoprazole ppi acid stomach ulcer heartburn takeda tablet

dosageAdults: 4–8mg up to 3 times daily
onsetTime: Relieves nausea within 30–60 minutes
summaryEn: Zofran (Ondansetron) is a powerful anti-nausea medicine used after surgery, chemotherapy, or for severe vomiting. It blocks the signals in the brain that trigger nausea.
summaryUr: زوفران (آنڈانسیٹرون) آپریشن کے بعد، کیموتھراپی میں یا شدید قے کے لیے ایک طاقتور متلی روکنے والی دوائی ہے۔ یہ دماغ میں متلی پیدا کرنے والے اشاروں کو روکتی ہے۔
warningsPlain: May affect heart rhythm in rare cases. Avoid in patients with congenital QT prolongation.
sideEffectsPlain: Headache, constipation, warm sensation. Rarely affects heart rhythm.
pregnancySafetyPlain: Use with caution in pregnancy, especially first trimester.
importantNote: Available as tablet, oral dissolving tablet, and injection. For severe vomiting when cannot swallow, use injection form.
warnings: QT prolongation risk at high doses
Serotonin syndrome risk with other serotonergic drugs
searchKeywords: zofran ondansetron antiemetic nausea vomiting chemotherapy gsk tablet

dosageAdults: 10–20mg up to 4 times daily
onsetTime: Relieves spasm within 15–30 minutes
summaryEn: Buscopan relieves stomach and intestinal cramps, IBS pain, and period pain. It works by relaxing the muscles of the digestive system.
summaryUr: بسکوپان معدے اور آنتوں کے درد، IBS کے درد اور ماہانہ تکلیف سے راحت دیتی ہے۔ یہ ہاضمے کے نظام کے پٹھوں کو آرام دے کر کام کرتی ہے۔
warningsPlain: May cause dry mouth and blurred vision. Avoid in glaucoma and enlarged prostate.
sideEffectsPlain: Dry mouth, blurred vision, difficulty urinating, constipation.
pregnancySafetyPlain: Use with caution in pregnancy.
importantNote: Do not use if you have glaucoma or enlarged prostate without medical advice.
searchKeywords: buscopan hyoscine butylbromide antispasmodic stomach cramps IBS boehringer tablet

dosageAdults: 1–2 puffs every 4–6 hours as needed; 2 puffs before exercise
dosageChildren: 1–2 puffs as needed (use spacer for children under 8)
maxDailyDose: 8 puffs (800mcg) in 24 hours; seek help if needing more
onsetTime: Relieves breathing difficulty within 5–15 minutes
storageInstructions: Store below 30°C. Do not puncture or burn canister.
summaryEn: Ventolin (Salbutamol) is a reliever inhaler that opens up the airways quickly during an asthma attack or shortness of breath. It is a rescue inhaler — use it when you need it, not every day.
summaryUr: ونٹولن (سالبیوٹامول) ایک ریلیور انہیلر ہے جو دمے کے دورے یا سانس پھولنے کے دوران سانس کی نالیاں جلدی کھول دیتا ہے۔ یہ ایک ریسکیو انہیلر ہے — جب ضرورت ہو تب استعمال کریں۔
warningsPlain: This is a reliever — not a preventer. If using more than 3 times a week, your asthma is not controlled — see your doctor.
sideEffectsPlain: Tremor, fast heartbeat, headache. These are more common if too many puffs taken.
pregnancySafetyPlain: Generally safe during pregnancy. Use lowest effective dose.
importantNote: Blue inhaler = reliever (use when needed). If needing it more than twice a week, consult your doctor about a preventer inhaler.
searchKeywords: ventolin salbutamol bronchodilator inhaler asthma breathing gsk reliever

dosageAdults: 10mg once daily in the evening
dosageChildren: 5mg chewable tablet for ages 6–14; 4mg for ages 2–5
onsetTime: Reduces symptoms within a few days; full effect in 1–2 weeks
storageInstructions: Store below 25°C away from moisture and light
summaryEn: Singulair (Montelukast) is a once-daily preventer for asthma and allergic rhinitis (hay fever). It reduces airway inflammation and is especially useful for exercise-induced asthma.
summaryUr: سنگولیئر (مونٹیلیوکاسٹ) دمے اور الرجک ناک بہنے کے لیے روزانہ ایک بار لی جانے والی احتیاطی دوائی ہے۔ یہ سانس کی نالیوں کی سوزش کم کرتی ہے۔
warningsPlain: Monitor for mood changes or depression — report to doctor. Not a rescue inhaler.
sideEffectsPlain: Headache, stomach pain, fatigue. Rare: mood changes, depression, suicidal thoughts.
pregnancySafetyPlain: Use with caution in pregnancy. Consult doctor.
importantNote: Take in the evening. This is a preventer — does not relieve acute attacks. Continue using reliever inhaler for attacks.
searchKeywords: singulair montelukast asthma allergic rhinitis preventer msd tablet

dosageAdults: 30mg 3 times daily; sustained-release 75mg once daily
onsetTime: Begins thinning mucus within 30 minutes
summaryEn: Mucosolvan (Ambroxol) thins and loosens mucus in the airways, making it easier to cough up. Used for chest infections, bronchitis, and other conditions where mucus is thick and difficult to clear.
summaryUr: میوکوسولوان (امبروکسول) سانس کی نالیوں میں بلغم کو پتلا اور ڈھیلا کرتی ہے جس سے کھانسی کرنا آسان ہو جاتا ہے۔ سینے کی انفیکشن، برونکائٹس میں استعمال ہوتی ہے۔
warningsPlain: Drink plenty of water while taking this medicine to help thin mucus.
sideEffectsPlain: Nausea, vomiting, diarrhoea. Generally well tolerated.
pregnancySafetyPlain: Avoid in first trimester. Use with caution thereafter.
importantNote: Drink plenty of fluids. Best taken after meals.
warnings: Avoid in first trimester of pregnancy
searchKeywords: mucosolvan ambroxol mucolytic expectorant cough bronchitis boehringer tablet

dosageAdults: 100mg 3 times daily; adjust based on blood levels
onsetTime: Takes several days to reach stable blood levels
summaryEn: Dilantin (Phenytoin) controls seizures in epilepsy. Regular blood tests are needed to maintain levels in the therapeutic range. Many drug interactions — always inform your doctor of all medicines taken.
summaryUr: ڈیلینٹن (فینیٹوئن) مرگی میں دورے کنٹرول کرتی ہے۔ علاج کی سطح برقرار رکھنے کے لیے باقاعدہ خون کے ٹیسٹ ضروری ہیں۔
warningsPlain: Do not stop suddenly. Many drug interactions. Regular blood levels monitoring required. May cause gum overgrowth — good dental hygiene essential.
sideEffectsPlain: Dizziness, unsteadiness, gum overgrowth, hirsutism, rash.
pregnancySafetyPlain: Risk of birth defects. Use only if essential. Folic acid supplementation needed.
importantNote: Never stop without doctor advice. Carry epilepsy card.
searchKeywords: dilantin phenytoin antiepileptic seizure epilepsy pfizer capsule

dosageAdults: 100–200mg 1–2 times daily initially; increase to 800–1200mg
onsetTime: Therapeutic effect within days to weeks
summaryEn: Tegretol (Carbamazepine) treats epilepsy, trigeminal neuralgia (facial nerve pain), and bipolar disorder. Requires regular blood tests for levels, liver function, and blood count.
summaryUr: ٹیگریٹول (کاربامازیپین) مرگی، چہرے کے اعصابی درد اور بائی پولر ڈس آرڈر کا علاج کرتی ہے۔ باقاعدہ خون کے ٹیسٹ ضروری ہیں۔
warningsPlain: Do not stop suddenly. Regular blood tests required. May cause dangerous skin reactions in some Asian populations — genetic test recommended before use.
sideEffectsPlain: Dizziness, drowsiness, nausea, double vision, rash.
pregnancySafetyPlain: Risk of birth defects. Use folic acid. Consult doctor.
importantNote: Never stop abruptly. Avoid grapefruit juice. May reduce effectiveness of oral contraceptives.
searchKeywords: tegretol carbamazepine antiepileptic seizure bipolar neuralgia novartis tablet

dosageAdults: 2–10mg 2–4 times daily (short-term use only)
onsetTime: Calming effect within 15–30 minutes
summaryEn: Valium (Diazepam) relieves severe anxiety, muscle spasms, and is used for alcohol withdrawal and seizure control. It is habit-forming and should be used for the shortest possible time.
summaryUr: ویلیم (ڈایازیپام) شدید پریشانی، پٹھوں کی کھچاؤ کم کرتی ہے اور الکوحل چھوڑنے اور دوروں کنٹرول کے لیے استعمال ہوتی ہے۔ یہ عادت بنانے والی ہے اور کم سے کم وقت استعمال کی جائے۔
warningsPlain: Very habit-forming — do not use for more than 2–4 weeks. Causes drowsiness — do not drive. Do not take with alcohol.
sideEffectsPlain: Drowsiness, confusion, memory problems, dependency with long-term use.
pregnancySafetyPlain: Avoid in pregnancy especially first trimester and before delivery.
importantNote: Short-term use only. Do not drive. Do not mix with alcohol. Do not stop abruptly after long use.
searchKeywords: valium diazepam benzodiazepine anxiety muscle spasm seizure roche tablet

dosageAdults: 20mg once daily in the morning; may increase to 60mg
dosageChildren: 10–20mg daily for children over 8 (under specialist supervision)
onsetTime: Antidepressant effect takes 2–4 weeks to develop
summaryEn: Prozac (Fluoxetine) is an antidepressant used for depression, obsessive-compulsive disorder, bulimia, and panic disorder. It takes 2–4 weeks to feel the full benefit.
summaryUr: پروزیک (فلوکسیٹین) ڈپریشن، جنونی فکر کے عارضے، بولیمیا اور گھبراہٹ کے عارضے کے لیے اینٹی ڈیپریسنٹ ہے۔ مکمل فائدہ محسوس ہونے میں 2-4 ہفتے لگتے ہیں۔
warningsPlain: Do not stop suddenly. May increase suicidal thoughts in young people at start of treatment — monitor closely. Avoid MAO inhibitors.
sideEffectsPlain: Nausea, headache, insomnia, sexual dysfunction, agitation at start.
pregnancySafetyPlain: Discuss risks/benefits with doctor. Can cause neonatal effects if used near delivery.
importantNote: Takes 2–4 weeks to work. Do not stop without doctor advice. Report any unusual mood changes.
warnings: Suicidal ideation in young patients at start
searchKeywords: prozac fluoxetine ssri antidepressant depression anxiety ocd eli lilly capsule

dosageAdults: 10mg once daily
dosageChildren: 5mg once daily for ages 6–11; 2.5mg twice daily for ages 2–5
onsetTime: Starts working within 1 hour; lasts 24 hours
summaryEn: Zyrtec (Cetirizine) relieves hay fever, allergic rhinitis, hives, and itchy skin. It is a non-drowsy antihistamine suitable for daily use.
summaryUr: زیرٹک (سیٹریزین) ہے فیور، الرجک ناک بہنے، چھپاکی اور خارش والی جلد سے راحت دیتی ہے۔ یہ ایک کم نیند آور اینٹی ہسٹامین ہے۔
warningsPlain: May cause mild drowsiness in some people. Avoid alcohol.
sideEffectsPlain: Mild drowsiness, dry mouth, headache. Generally well tolerated.
pregnancySafetyPlain: Use with caution in pregnancy.
importantNote: Best taken at bedtime if it causes drowsiness. Safe for long-term use under medical supervision.
searchKeywords: zyrtec cetirizine antihistamine allergy hay fever hives itching ucb tablet

dosageAdults: 10mg once daily
onsetTime: Starts working within 1–3 hours; lasts 24 hours
summaryEn: Clarityne (Loratadine) is a non-drowsy antihistamine for allergies, hay fever, and hives. It does not cross into the brain so causes very little drowsiness.
summaryUr: کلیریٹائن (لوراٹاڈین) الرجی، ہے فیور اور چھپاکی کے لیے ایک کم نیند آور اینٹی ہسٹامین ہے۔ یہ دماغ تک بہت کم پہنچتی ہے۔
warningsPlain: Very low sedation risk. Safe for driving in most people.
sideEffectsPlain: Headache, dry mouth. Minimal drowsiness.
pregnancySafetyPlain: Generally considered safe. Consult doctor.
importantNote: Can be taken any time of day. Very safe for long-term use.
warnings: Dose reduction in severe liver disease
searchKeywords: clarityne loratadine antihistamine allergy hay fever non-drowsy msd tablet

dosageAdults: 50–200mcg once daily — dose adjusted by TSH blood test
dosageChildren: Individualised by specialist based on weight and age
onsetTime: Symptoms improve within a few weeks; full effect in 6–8 weeks
storageInstructions: Store below 25°C away from moisture and light
summaryEn: Eltroxin (Levothyroxine) replaces the thyroid hormone that your thyroid gland cannot produce enough of. It treats hypothyroidism. Take on an empty stomach 30–60 minutes before breakfast every day.
summaryUr: ایلٹروکسن (لیووتھائروکسن) وہ تھائرائڈ ہارمون بدل دیتی ہے جو آپ کا تھائرائڈ غدود کافی مقدار میں نہیں بنا سکتا۔ یہ ہائپوتھائرائیڈزم کا علاج کرتی ہے۔
warningsPlain: Take on empty stomach 30–60 minutes before breakfast. Regular TSH blood tests required. Many foods and medicines affect absorption.
sideEffectsPlain: Side effects are usually signs of too much dose: fast heartbeat, tremor, weight loss, insomnia.
pregnancySafetyPlain: Essential in pregnancy — thyroid function must be maintained. Dose often needs adjustment.
importantNote: Take same time every day on empty stomach. Never double dose. Regular TSH monitoring is essential.
warnings: Do not stop without doctor advice
searchKeywords: eltroxin levothyroxine thyroid hypothyroidism gsk tablet

dosageAdults: 5–60mg daily depending on condition; take in the morning with food
onsetTime: Anti-inflammatory effect within hours; full effect in days
summaryEn: Prednisolone is a steroid that reduces inflammation and suppresses the immune system. Used for asthma attacks, severe allergies, rheumatoid arthritis, inflammatory bowel disease, and many other conditions.
summaryUr: پریڈنیسولون ایک سٹیرائیڈ ہے جو سوزش کم کرتی ہے اور مدافعتی نظام کو دباتی ہے۔ دمے کے دوروں، شدید الرجی، گٹھیا اور آنتوں کی سوزش میں استعمال ہوتی ہے۔
warningsPlain: Do not stop suddenly after more than 3 weeks use — taper dose under doctor supervision. Take with food. May increase blood sugar and blood pressure.
sideEffectsPlain: Weight gain, increased appetite, insomnia, mood changes, raised blood sugar, stomach irritation.
pregnancySafetyPlain: Use only if essential. Discuss with doctor.
importantNote: Take with food in the morning. Carry steroid card if on long-term treatment. Never stop abruptly.
warnings: Never stop abruptly after prolonged use
searchKeywords: prednisolone steroid corticosteroid anti-inflammatory asthma arthritis tablet

dosageAdults: 100mg twice daily for 3 days (for most worm infections); single 500mg dose for some
dosageChildren: Same as adults for children over 2 years
onsetTime: Kills worms within 1–3 days
summaryEn: Vermox (Mebendazole) treats roundworm, threadworm (pinworm), hookworm, and whipworm infections. Tablets can be chewed or swallowed. All household members should be treated simultaneously.
summaryUr: ورموکس (میبینڈازول) گول کیڑوں، دھاگے کے کیڑوں، ہک کیڑوں اور کوڑے کے کیڑوں کا علاج کرتی ہے۔ گولیاں چبائی یا نگلی جا سکتی ہیں۔ گھر کے تمام افراد کا ایک ساتھ علاج ہونا چاہیے۔
warningsPlain: All family members should be treated at the same time. Wash hands and bedding after treatment.
sideEffectsPlain: Generally very well tolerated. May cause brief stomach pain as worms die.
pregnancySafetyPlain: Avoid in first trimester. Consult doctor.
importantNote: Treat the whole family. Wash all bedding and towels. Maintain strict hand hygiene.
searchKeywords: vermox mebendazole anthelmintic deworming worm roundworm threadworm janssen tablet

dosageAdults: 400mg single dose for most intestinal worms; longer courses for tissue worms
dosageChildren: 400mg single dose for children over 2; 200mg for under 2
onsetTime: Single dose effective within 1–3 days for intestinal worms
summaryEn: Zentel (Albendazole) treats a wide range of worm infections including roundworm, hookworm, whipworm, and also some tissue parasites. The single-dose treatment is convenient for routine deworming.
summaryUr: زینٹل (البینڈازول) گول کیڑوں، ہک کیڑوں، کوڑے کے کیڑوں اور کچھ ٹشو پرجیویوں سمیت بہت سی کیڑوں کی انفیکشن کا علاج کرتی ہے۔
warningsPlain: Take with fatty food for better absorption. Treat all household contacts.
sideEffectsPlain: Usually well tolerated. Mild stomach pain, nausea.
pregnancySafetyPlain: Contraindicated in pregnancy. Use effective contraception during treatment.
importantNote: Take after a fatty meal for best absorption. Single dose is effective for most common worms.
searchKeywords: zentel albendazole anthelmintic deworming worm hookworm gsk tablet

dosageAdults: 150mg single dose for vaginal thrush; longer courses for other fungal infections
dosageChildren: 3–6 mg/kg once daily under medical supervision
onsetTime: Starts working within hours; full effect in 1–3 days
summaryEn: Diflucan (Fluconazole) treats fungal infections including vaginal thrush, oral thrush, skin fungal infections, and serious systemic fungal infections. The 150mg single dose is used for uncomplicated vaginal thrush.
summaryUr: ڈیفلیوکان (فلوکونازول) فنگل انفیکشن کا علاج کرتی ہے جن میں اندام نہانی کا تھرش، منہ کا تھرش، جلد کی فنگل انفیکشن شامل ہیں۔ 150mg ایک خوراک غیر پیچیدہ اندام نہانی تھرش کے لیے ہے۔
warningsPlain: Many drug interactions. May affect liver. Avoid in pregnancy especially first trimester.
sideEffectsPlain: Nausea, headache, stomach pain. Rarely liver effects.
pregnancySafetyPlain: Avoid especially in first trimester. High doses contraindicated.
importantNote: Single dose for vaginal thrush. For recurrent infections, consult doctor for longer course.
searchKeywords: diflucan fluconazole antifungal thrush candida pfizer capsule

dosageAdults: 400mg 3 times daily for herpes simplex; higher doses for zoster
dosageChildren: Dose based on weight under specialist supervision
onsetTime: Most effective when started within 48–72 hours of symptoms
summaryEn: Zovirax (Acyclovir) treats cold sores, genital herpes, chickenpox, and shingles. It does not cure herpes but reduces the severity and duration of outbreaks. Drink plenty of water.
summaryUr: زوویراکس (اسائکلووئر) ٹھنڈے زخموں، جننانگ ہرپس، چکن پاکس اور شنگلز کا علاج کرتی ہے۔ یہ ہرپس کا علاج نہیں کرتی لیکن دوروں کی شدت اور مدت کم کرتی ہے۔
warningsPlain: Drink plenty of water. Start as early as possible at onset of symptoms. Adjust dose in kidney disease.
sideEffectsPlain: Nausea, headache, dizziness. High doses can affect kidneys — drink plenty of water.
pregnancySafetyPlain: Use with caution in pregnancy. Consult doctor.
importantNote: Start treatment as early as possible. Drink at least 2L of water daily during treatment.
sideEffects: Renal impairment (high doses without adequate hydration)
searchKeywords: zovirax acyclovir antiviral herpes chickenpox shingles cold sores gsk tablet

dosageAdults: 50–100mg every 4–6 hours as needed
onsetTime: Relieves pain within 30–60 minutes
summaryEn: Tramal (Tramadol) is a strong painkiller for moderate to severe pain when other painkillers are not sufficient. It acts on opioid receptors in the brain. Can be habit-forming with long-term use.
summaryUr: ٹرامال (ٹراماڈول) درمیانے سے شدید درد کے لیے ایک طاقتور درد کش دوائی ہے جب دوسری درد کش دوائیں کافی نہ ہوں۔ یہ دماغ میں اوپیائیڈ ریسیپٹرز پر کام کرتی ہے۔
warningsPlain: Habit-forming — use only as prescribed. Causes drowsiness — do not drive. Do not take with alcohol. Risk of seizures at high doses.
sideEffectsPlain: Nausea, vomiting, dizziness, drowsiness, constipation. Risk of dependence.
pregnancySafetyPlain: Avoid in pregnancy especially near delivery.
importantNote: Do not exceed recommended dose. Do not drive. Avoid alcohol. Not for long-term self-medication.
warnings: Do not combine with alcohol or other CNS depressants
searchKeywords: tramal tramadol opioid analgesic pain relief grunenthal capsule

dosageAdults: 1000–2000 IU daily for deficiency prevention; up to 4000 IU for deficiency treatment
maxDailyDose: 4000 IU daily (safe upper limit for adults without deficiency)
onsetTime: Blood levels improve within 2–4 weeks
summaryEn: Calcirol (Vitamin D3) is essential for strong bones, immune function, and many body processes. Deficiency is extremely common in Pakistan due to indoor lifestyle and covered clothing. Take with a fatty meal for best absorption.
summaryUr: کیلسیرول (وٹامن ڈی 3) مضبوط ہڈیوں، مدافعتی افعال اور جسم کے بہت سے عمل کے لیے ضروری ہے۔ پاکستان میں کمی بہت عام ہے۔ بہترین جذب کے لیے چکنائی والے کھانے کے ساتھ لیں۔
warningsPlain: Do not take very high doses without monitoring blood levels — excess causes calcium buildup. Take with fatty meal.
sideEffectsPlain: Very safe at recommended doses. Overdose: nausea, constipation, kidney stones.
pregnancySafetyPlain: Safe and recommended in pregnancy at standard doses.
importantNote: Take with a meal containing fat for maximum absorption. Sunshine exposure also helps.
warnings: Toxicity at very high doses (>10000 IU/day long-term)
searchKeywords: calcirol vitamin d3 cholecalciferol bone immune deficiency sanofi capsule

dosageAdults: 200mg 3 times daily for iron-deficiency anaemia
onsetTime: Haemoglobin begins improving within 2–3 weeks; full correction in 2–3 months
summaryEn: Ferrous Sulphate corrects iron-deficiency anaemia — the most common cause of anaemia, especially in women and children. Take on an empty stomach with orange juice for best absorption, or with food to reduce stomach side effects.
summaryUr: فیرس سلفیٹ آئرن کی کمی سے خون کی کمی کو ٹھیک کرتی ہے — یہ خون کی کمی کی سب سے عام وجہ ہے۔ بہترین جذب کے لیے خالی معدے پر اورنج جوس کے ساتھ لیں۔
warningsPlain: Keep out of reach of children — iron overdose is dangerous. Turns stools black. Avoid antacids, tea, and dairy within 2 hours.
sideEffectsPlain: Black stools (normal), constipation, nausea, stomach cramps.
pregnancySafetyPlain: Recommended and safe in pregnancy.
importantNote: Stools turning black is normal and harmless. Avoid tea, coffee, antacids, or milk within 2 hours of taking.
warnings: Iron poisoning risk in children — keep out of reach
searchKeywords: fersolate ferrous sulphate iron anaemia supplement tablet

dosageAdults: 5mg once daily for folate deficiency or pregnancy (prescribed); 400mcg for prevention
onsetTime: Blood count improvement within 2–3 weeks
summaryEn: Folic Acid prevents neural tube defects in the developing baby and treats folate-deficiency anaemia. All women of childbearing age should take 400mcg daily. The 5mg dose is for treating deficiency or high-risk pregnancies.
summaryUr: فولک ایسڈ نشوونما پاتے بچے میں اعصابی نالی کے نقائص کو روکتی ہے اور فولیٹ کی کمی سے خون کی کمی کا علاج کرتی ہے۔ بچہ پیدا کرنے کی عمر کی تمام خواتین کو روزانہ 400 mcg لینی چاہیے۔
warningsPlain: Folic acid should not mask vitamin B12 deficiency — check B12 first.
sideEffectsPlain: Very safe. Very rarely causes allergic reactions.
pregnancySafetyPlain: Recommended before and during pregnancy.
importantNote: Start taking folic acid before becoming pregnant — ideally 3 months before conception.
warnings: May mask B12 deficiency — check B12 levels
searchKeywords: folvite folic acid vitamin b9 pregnancy anaemia neural tube tablet

dosageAdults: 1–2 tablets daily with meals
onsetTime: Bone density improvement over months of regular use
summaryEn: Calvita provides calcium and Vitamin D3 together to strengthen bones and prevent osteoporosis. Take with meals for best absorption. Especially important for women over 50 and those on long-term steroids.
summaryUr: کالوِٹا ہڈیاں مضبوط کرنے اور ہڈیوں کے بھربھرا ہونے سے بچانے کے لیے کیلشیم اور وٹامن ڈی 3 ایک ساتھ فراہم کرتی ہے۔
warningsPlain: Do not exceed recommended dose. Space doses if taking iron or thyroid medication.
sideEffectsPlain: Constipation, bloating, excess calcium if overdosed.
pregnancySafetyPlain: Safe and recommended in pregnancy.
importantNote: Take with meals. Separate from iron and thyroid medications by at least 2 hours.
warnings: Do not exceed safe upper limit
searchKeywords: calvita calcium vitamin d3 bone osteoporosis supplement wyeth tablet

dosageAdults: Apply thinly 2–3 times daily for 2–4 weeks
onsetTime: Itching relief within days; full clearance in 2–4 weeks
summaryEn: Canesten (Clotrimazole cream) treats fungal skin infections including athlete's foot, ringworm, and fungal nappy rash. Apply to clean dry skin and continue for the full recommended course.
summaryUr: کینسٹن (کلوٹریمازول کریم) فنگل جلد کی انفیکشن کا علاج کرتی ہے جس میں ایتھلیٹ فٹ، رنگ ورم شامل ہیں۔ صاف خشک جلد پر لگائیں۔
warningsPlain: External use only. Avoid eyes. Continue treatment for full course to prevent recurrence.
sideEffectsPlain: Mild burning or irritation on first application.
pregnancySafetyPlain: Safe for topical use during pregnancy.
importantNote: Complete the full course even if symptoms clear. Keep skin dry and clean.
searchKeywords: canesten clotrimazole antifungal cream skin ringworm athlete foot bayer

dosageAdults: Apply small amount 3 times daily for up to 10 days
onsetTime: Improvement in 3–5 days
summaryEn: Bactroban (Mupirocin) is a topical antibiotic ointment for infected skin wounds, impetigo, and folliculitis. It is also used to clear nasal MRSA carriage. Apply to clean skin.
summaryUr: بیکٹروبن (میوپائروسن) انفیکشن والے جلد کے زخموں، امپیٹیگو کے لیے ایک بیرونی اینٹی بائیوٹک مرہم ہے۔
warningsPlain: External use only. Avoid eyes. Do not use on large areas. For short-term use only.
sideEffectsPlain: Mild burning, itching, or stinging. Rarely skin rash.
pregnancySafetyPlain: Safe for topical use during pregnancy.
importantNote: Apply to clean dry skin. For nasal use, apply inside nostril. Use for maximum 10 days.
searchKeywords: bactroban mupirocin topical antibiotic skin infection impetigo gsk ointment

dosageAdults: 200–400mg once daily with food for 2–8 weeks
onsetTime: Antifungal effect within 1–2 weeks
summaryEn: Nizoral (Ketoconazole) treats fungal infections including skin fungal infections, oral thrush, and dandruff. Oral tablets reserved for serious infections; shampoo form widely used for dandruff and scalp infections.
summaryUr: نیزورل (کیٹوکونازول) فنگل انفیکشن کا علاج کرتی ہے جن میں جلد کی فنگل انفیکشن اور خشکی شامل ہیں۔
warningsPlain: Liver toxicity risk — monitor liver function. Many drug interactions. Take with acid-containing drink.
sideEffectsPlain: Nausea, stomach pain, liver toxicity (rarely), hormone effects at high doses.
pregnancySafetyPlain: Avoid oral tablets in pregnancy.
importantNote: Take with food or acidic drink. Regular liver function tests if on prolonged course.
searchKeywords: nizoral ketoconazole antifungal skin dandruff thrush janssen tablet

dosageAdults: 4mg initially then 2mg after each loose stool; max 16mg/day
dosageChildren: Not for children under 2 years; use with caution under 12
onsetTime: Reduces diarrhoea frequency within 1–3 hours
summaryEn: Imodium (Loperamide) slows down gut movement to reduce acute diarrhoea. Use with ORS to replace lost fluids. Do not use for bloody diarrhoea or if you have fever — see a doctor.
summaryUr: ایموڈیم (لوپیرامائیڈ) آنتوں کی حرکت کو سست کرکے شدید اسہال کم کرتی ہے۔ ضائع شدہ سیال کی بھرپائی کے لیے ORS کے ساتھ استعمال کریں۔ خونی اسہال یا بخار ہو تو ڈاکٹر سے ملیں۔
warningsPlain: Do not use if diarrhoea contains blood or you have fever. Drink ORS alongside. Do not use as primary treatment if infectious cause suspected.
sideEffectsPlain: Constipation, stomach cramps, dizziness.
pregnancySafetyPlain: Avoid in first trimester. Use with caution.
importantNote: Always use with ORS to replace fluids. If no improvement in 2 days or if blood in stool, see doctor.
warnings: Do not use for bloody diarrhoea
Do not use in bacterial diarrhoea with fever
drugInteractions: Drugs that prolong QT interval at high doses
searchKeywords: imodium loperamide antidiarrhoeal diarrhoea loose stools janssen capsule

dosageAdults: 50mg once daily; may increase to 200mg
dosageChildren: 25mg once daily for OCD in children over 6 (specialist)
onsetTime: Antidepressant effect takes 2–4 weeks; full effect 6–8 weeks
summaryEn: Zoloft (Sertraline) treats depression, anxiety disorders, PTSD, OCD, and panic disorder. Take at the same time daily. Give it at least 4 weeks before judging effectiveness.
summaryUr: زولوفٹ (سیرٹرالین) ڈپریشن، پریشانی کے عوارض، PTSD، OCD اور گھبراہٹ کے عارضے کا علاج کرتی ہے۔ ہر روز ایک ہی وقت پر لیں۔
warningsPlain: Do not stop suddenly. May increase suicidal thoughts in young patients at start — monitor closely. Avoid MAOIs.
sideEffectsPlain: Nausea, diarrhoea, insomnia, sexual dysfunction, dry mouth.
pregnancySafetyPlain: Discuss with doctor. May cause neonatal effects if used near delivery.
importantNote: Takes 4–6 weeks to work fully. Never stop suddenly. Report any unusual mood changes.
warnings: Suicidal ideation monitoring in young patients
searchKeywords: zoloft sertraline ssri antidepressant depression anxiety ptsd pfizer tablet

dosageAdults: 0.5–5mg 2–3 times daily; up to 20mg in acute psychosis
onsetTime: Acute sedation within hours; antipsychotic effect over days-weeks
summaryEn: Haldol (Haloperidol) is used for schizophrenia, acute psychosis, severe agitation, and Tourette syndrome. It requires careful dose management and monitoring for movement disorders.
summaryUr: ہالڈول (ہیلوپیریڈول) شیزوفرینیا، شدید نفسیاتی کیفیت، شدید اضطراب اور ٹوریٹ سنڈروم کے لیے استعمال ہوتی ہے۔
warningsPlain: May cause stiffness, tremor, and involuntary movements (EPS). Must not be stopped abruptly. Monitor ECG in elderly.
sideEffectsPlain: Movement disorders (EPS), restlessness, drowsiness, weight gain, QT prolongation.
pregnancySafetyPlain: Use only if essential. Discuss with specialist.
importantNote: Regular review of dose required. Monitor for movement side effects. Do not stop abruptly.
searchKeywords: haldol haloperidol antipsychotic schizophrenia psychosis janssen tablet

dosageAdults: 40mg once daily in the morning; may increase to 80–120mg
onsetTime: Diuresis starts within 30–60 minutes; lasts 4–6 hours
summaryEn: Lasix (Furosemide) removes excess fluid from the body by making you pass more urine. Used for heart failure, kidney disease, and oedema. Take in the morning to avoid night-time urination.
summaryUr: لاسکس (فیوروسیمائیڈ) زیادہ پیشاب کراکر جسم سے اضافی سیال نکالتی ہے۔ دل کی ناکامی، گردے کی بیماری اور سوجن میں استعمال ہوتی ہے۔ رات کو پیشاب سے بچنے کے لیے صبح لیں۔
warningsPlain: May cause potassium loss — eat bananas and potassium-rich foods. Take in the morning. Monitor kidneys and electrolytes regularly.
sideEffectsPlain: Frequent urination, electrolyte imbalance (low potassium), dizziness on standing.
pregnancySafetyPlain: Use with caution in pregnancy.
importantNote: Take in the morning. Stay hydrated. Watch for dizziness when standing up quickly.
searchKeywords: lasix furosemide diuretic oedema heart failure kidney sanofi tablet

dosageAdults: 250–500mg twice daily with food
onsetTime: Starts fighting infection within 1–2 hours
summaryEn: Zinnat (Cefuroxime) is a broad-spectrum oral antibiotic for chest infections, sinusitis, urinary tract infections, and Lyme disease. Must be taken with food for proper absorption.
summaryUr: زینات (سیفیوروکسیم) سینے کی انفیکشن، سائنوسائٹس، پیشاب کی نالی کی انفیکشن کے لیے ایک وسیع الطیف اورل اینٹی بائیوٹک ہے۔ مناسب جذب کے لیے کھانے کے ساتھ لینی ضروری ہے۔
warningsPlain: Must be taken with food. Cross-reactivity with penicillin allergy possible. Complete full course.
sideEffectsPlain: Diarrhoea, nausea, skin rash, abdominal pain.
pregnancySafetyPlain: Generally considered safe. Consult doctor.
importantNote: Take with food — absorption is much better with meals. Swallow whole, do not crush.
searchKeywords: zinnat cefuroxime cephalosporin antibiotic chest sinus uti gsk tablet
